description: S3 Noncurrent Version Accumulation — Versioning-enabled S3 buckets with no lifecycle policy accumulate noncurrent object versions indefinitely, causing unbounded storage cost growth.

cost.note: S3 Standard storage $0.023/GB-month (us-east-1). Noncurrent versions are billed at the same rate as current objects. Lifecycle expiry stops cost accumulation.

severity_rules.name: versioning_no_lifecycle
severity_rules.condition: versioning_status == 'Enabled' AND lifecycle_config_exists == false AND noncurrent_version_count_slope > threshold
severity_rules.description: Versioning is enabled but no lifecycle policy expires noncurrent versions. Noncurrent version count is growing, confirming unbounded accumulation.
